title: Usopp Challenges Luffy
description: The Franky Family’s attack and the loss of the crew’s money push Usopp into danger and make Water Seven personal.
scene: Across pages 16, 17, this part follows Nami, Franky Family, Sanji, Chopper, Franky. The Franky Family’s attack and the loss of the crew’s money push Usopp into danger and make Water Seven personal.
